summary: Frontend-only testing of NULLAI Protocol V2 landing page against public URL. Verified 31 distinct assertions covering all spec items from review request. All content, data-testids, links, clipboard behavior, and responsive layout are correct. 0 console errors on load. 28/31 script assertions passed; the 3 apparent failures were false-negatives caused by CSS text-transform:uppercase vs case-sensitive string matching and one local scope typo — visually and functionally all three features pass (verified via screenshot showing 'COPIED' state on primary copy button and correct 'LAUNCHPAD INCOMING // SOON' CTA label, plus successful clipboard.readText() on the Vortex copy button).
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: App.js uses a nested <Route path='/' element={<Home />}><Route index element={<Home />} /></Route> which double-mounts Home. Harmless but unnecessary — collapse to a single route.

Minor: siteConfig.links.pinksale is an empty string; Footer renders 'PinkSale URL pending' as a plain span which is fine, but consider explicit null-check to avoid surprises if someone renders it as href later.
No code-splitting / lazy loading — acceptable for a single-page landing site.
All components use data-testid consistently. Good testability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL https://nullai-mainnet.preview.emergentagent.com. All data-testids listed in review request are present and correct. Clipboard tests require page.context.grant_permissions(['clipboard-read','clipboard-write']). When asserting text against elements with CSS 'text-transform: uppercase' (font-mono uppercase classes), use case-insensitive matching or read the underlying textContent via element handles rather than inner_text(). Verified assertions: top-banner='MAINNET PROTOCOL DEPLOYED — V2 SECURED'; hero status pill='LIVE ON BASE MAINNET'; hero title='The Autonomous Scarcity Organism'; hero primary CTA label='Launchpad Incoming' (disabled-styled, href='#'), visible and present; secondary CTA 'Read the Manifesto' → href='#whitepaper'; PrimaryContractBox address=0x86aC40CD4c57f68E89c515BF45d9fD19d7CcF095, copy writes to clipboard; 3 ContractRows (NULLAI Token, VortexEngine, OracleManager) each with correct address, working copy button, and BaseScan link (target=_blank, https://basescan.org/address/<addr>); AuditBadge verdict='VERDICT: SAFE FOR MAINNET' and note='Audit performed by Antigravity AI on 01/05/26'; all 5 feature cards present with exact titles; 6 whitepaper sections 01..06 with headings Thesis, Vision, Core Architecture, Mainnet Security Model, Economic Logic, Protocol Philosophy; 3 tokenomics items with exact spec values; footer X link=https://x.com/NULLAIPROTOCOL?s=20 (target=_blank); footer Telegram=https://t.me/NULLAI_protocol (target=_blank); footer disclaimer exact. 0 console errors.
